input: session sequences (user-item interactions within sessions) and user behavior graph (long-term history) and neighborhood graph (neighbor sessions)
output: ranked list of items for the current session
backbone: time-aware graph neural network (TA-GNN) with two modules: user behavior graph encoder and neighborhood graph encoder
loss: cross-entropy loss (implied by session-based recommendation task)
key_idea: incorporate time interval information into graph construction and model both long-term user behavior and neighbor session information
datasets: three real world datasets (not named in abstract)
